_comment: Example single-edge entry from quality/state/cross-link-fidelity-tracker.json (per ADR-25, the tracker is gate-internal — distinct from the runner-readable catalog at quality/catalogs/cross-link-fidelity.json). See ../03-schemas.md for full tracker schema.
last_judge_rationale: README's framing covers the three DVCS roles + lag-ref invariant adequately. New section content (Cache desync recovery) is internal mechanic; not load-bearing for the reader's mental model from the README level. PASS.
